name: Duan et al. History-Aware Real Turn Comparison Extract
population_or_context: History-conditioned student simulation in math tutoring dialogues using prior question-answering and dialogue histories.
sample_size: The arXiv PDF reports 1,775 dialogues and 66,705 question-answering records from 670 students after data processing.
methods: Extracted the comparison between simulated future student turns and ground-truth real student turns under history/profile-conditioned workflows.
education_context: Math tutoring dialogue simulation with historical question-answering records and tutoring dialogue interactions.
response_origin: Simulated student turns are generated from model workflows and compared with ground-truth future student dialogue turns.
rubric_label_space: Turn-level Acts, Correctness, Errors, Cosine Similarity, and ROUGE-L metrics.
label_source: Ground-truth student turns, dialogue-act/correctness annotations, and model-based metrics provide evaluation labels.
generation_model: Prompting baselines use GPT-5.4; fine-tuned methods use Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, with GPT-4.1, GPT-5 mini, and embedding models used in support roles.
generation_method: Prompt-only student profiles, SFT, DPO, history SFT, profile-conditioned simulation, and ProfileRL with DPO for the simulator and GRPO for the profile generator.
prompt_strategy: Structured profiles summarize knowledge state, knowledge acquisition, misconceptions, dialogue behavior, and linguistic style from recent histories.
evaluation_method: Five-fold cross-validation compares simulated turns with ground truth across Acts, Correctness, Errors, Cosine Similarity, and ROUGE-L; ablations isolate profile sections and RL stages.
scorer_use: Dialogue simulator benchmarking; not automated scorer validation.
real_response_comparator: Ground-truth math tutoring dialogue turns from real students provide the comparator, with prior real histories used to construct profiles.
reported_metrics: Table 1 reports ProfileRL at Acts 0.644, Corr. 0.516, Errors 0.149, Cos. Sim. 0.700, ROUGE-L 0.296; Table 2 reports ProfileRL at Acts 0.605, Corr. 0.466, Errors 0.150, Cos. Sim. 0.689, ROUGE-L 0.271 versus Prompting Only at 0.502, 0.446, 0.109, 0.488, 0.145.
limitations: The source is a May 2026 arXiv preprint and should not be treated as peer-reviewed consensus.
The evaluated workflow uses a private math dataset, limiting independent replication.
The evidence compares workflow packages rather than isolated prompt, model, or training variables.
